disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: How South African scientists identified hantavirus on a cruise ship thousands of miles away - The Washington Post
updates.body_en: How South African scientists identified hantavirus on a cruise ship thousands of miles away The Washington Post
updates.summary_zh: 南非科学家识别出数千英里外邮轮上的汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: No Ebola cases in Canada and no new hantavirus cases, chief public health officer says - CBC
updates.body_en: No Ebola cases in Canada and no new hantavirus cases, chief public health officer says CBC Canada’s chief public health officer delivers updates on hantavirus, Ebola Radio-Canada Ontario patient tests negative for Ebola, while new border screening measures are in place amid Congo outbreak CTV News
